supported_here: R8 keeps the same direct-baseline endpoint fixed and raises retrieval pressure only on a bounded heavier-family suite.
Admitted rows export explicit event, read/write, candidate-depth, stack-depth, and control-transfer pressure metrics instead of implying pressure qualitatively.
unsupported_here: R8 does not widen semantics, reopen arbitrary compiled-language claims, or justify a broader systems-superiority statement.
Any contradiction-only route to E1c remains narrower than a general endpoint expansion.
